subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-30
subcodes.first_line: Recognition will not occur in a specific country where the Baha'ís should gather. In every land, the friends will progress and the Cause of God will be recognized without warfare or conflict. Christianity in France was emancipated in this manner.
subcodes.first_line_orig: رسمیت در یک مملکت بخصوص که بهائیان در آن جمع شوند نمی شود در هر جا
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @growth of the Cause, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees
